visual_features.overall_style: Very minimalist, system-style warning screen based on Google Material Design. Strongly utilitarian, with high contrast, flat colors, and almost no decorative elements. Feels modern, clean, trustworthy, and slightly formal.
visual_features.visual_hierarchy: Hierarchy is driven primarily by color contrast, size, and position: (1) Large red warning triangle icon centered near the top immediately attracts attention. (2) Bold, larger heading 'Your connection is not private' directly beneath serves as the main message. (3) Supporting paragraph text and domain name appear in regular weight, medium contrast. (4) Secondary system text (error code) is smaller and lighter. (5) A card-like callout for 'Turn on enhanced protection' follows, visually separated as an optional info/action. (6) Primary actions are at the bottom in a horizontal row, with a strong blue filled button as the primary CTA and a low-emphasis outlined button as secondary.
visual_features.whitespace_usage: Extremely generous whitespace with large top and side margins. Core content is in a centered, narrow column with ample vertical spacing between icon, heading, body, card, and actions. This creates a calm, focused experience around a small number of critical elements, reducing cognitive load.
unique_elements: Prominent centered red warning triangle icon with exclamation point as the primary visual signal.
Single-column, system-message-style layout with large empty margins around content.
Pill-shaped, low-elevation card for the 'Turn on enhanced protection' suggestion.
Distinct primary vs secondary actions using filled vs outlined pill buttons with Material-style color palette.

layout_characteristics.grid_system: Implicit single-column layout on a centered max-width container, likely aligned to an 8px or 4px Material grid. Content column roughly 600–720px wide with large outer margins.
layout_characteristics.layout_pattern: Centered, full-width background with a vertically stacked single column of content. All main elements are centered horizontally but text itself is left-aligned within the column.
layout_characteristics.section_organization: Top-to-bottom flow: (1) Warning icon section, (2) headline and explanatory copy, (3) secondary technical info (error code), (4) optional recommendation card ('Turn on enhanced protection'), (5) primary/secondary action button row at the bottom.
layout_characteristics.alignment: Horizontal center alignment of the main column on the page; internal elements are left-aligned text with consistent left edge. CTAs are aligned in a horizontal row, visually centered overall.
responsive_hints: Single column design will scale well on mobile by simply adjusting max-width; no dependency on sidebars.
Buttons are large pill shapes with enough padding to remain tappable on touch devices.
Generous whitespace suggests the layout can compress vertically on smaller viewports without feeling cramped.
layout_characteristics.content_arrangement: Linear top-to-bottom flow in a single content column: large warning icon at the top center, followed by a bold heading; then a multi-line paragraph explaining the risk and highlighting the domain in bold; then a small technical error code; then a self-contained card offering an optional feature; finally, a horizontally arranged pair of CTA buttons. No alternating columns or complex grids; everything stacks vertically.
layout_characteristics.space_allocation: Approximately the top 20–25% of the viewport is mostly blank with the warning icon occupying a small area near the top-center. The central 40–50% contains the text message and recommendation card in a narrow column. The lower part (last 15–20%) holds the action buttons with additional breathing room around them. Side margins are wide, leaving a central content band about 40–50% of the viewport width.
layout_characteristics.content_density: Low content density. The design is intentionally sparse with minimal text and a lot of vertical separation between elements. Generous padding around the card and large CTA buttons further lowers density, emphasizing clarity and safety over information volume.
layout_characteristics.visual_flow: Strong vertical flow: eye first lands on the large red warning icon at the top center, then moves down to the bold heading, continues to the explanatory paragraph and domain, then to the smaller error code. The light-gray card below attracts attention next, and finally the eye settles on the blue primary 'Back to safety' button at the bottom right of the CTA row. Overall: top-center to mid-left text down to bottom-center actions.

ui_patterns.visual_description: Primary button: pill-shaped rectangle with full rounding (approximately 20–24px radius), filled with solid blue (#1A73E8). White label text in medium/bold weight and all-lowercase or sentence case. Generous horizontal padding (around 16–24px) and moderate vertical padding (10–12px). No visible shadow; flat design with high contrast color. Secondary button: similar pill shape but with white background, subtle gray border (#DADCE0), and darker gray label text (#3C4043). Both buttons sit on white background with clear spacing between them.
ui_patterns.structural_pattern: Semantically should be . Primary/secondary distinction handled through modifier classes (e.g., .btn--primary, .btn--outlined).

ui_patterns.visual_description: Low-elevation card for 'Turn on enhanced protection': horizontally oriented pill-like container with large border-radius (~999px or at least 24px), white background, and thin light-gray border (#DADCE0). Inside, left-aligned circular icon area (lightbulb icon) and right-aligned title + description text stack. Internal padding is comfortable (about 16–20px horizontally, 12–16px vertically). No drop shadow; separation is through border, rounding, and whitespace.
ui_patterns.structural_pattern:
Likely structured as a flex container:
…

Title

Description

. The icon/text alignment organized via flexbox or grid, with vertical centering. For a home nursing site, this pattern can be reused as 'info pill' or 'feature suggestion' cards.

ui_patterns.visual_description: No actual form fields are visible in the screenshot. Based on the overall style, inputs would be clean, rectangular fields with either 4px–8px border-radius, subtle 1px border (#DADCE0), white background, and clear focus state (border color shifting to blue #1A73E8). Labels would likely be placed above or as floating labels, using small, medium-weight gray text.
ui_patterns.structural_pattern: Recommended pattern consistent with this UI: stacked labels with full-width inputs inside a vertical form: <form><label>Field label</label><input type='text' /></form>. Grouping via <div class='form-group'> wrappers, alignment via flex-column or block layout. Validation feedback in small text under inputs with semantic colors.

ui_patterns.visual_description: No traditional navigation bar is visible; the screen is a focused system dialog. Extrapolating from style: navigation would likely be horizontal at the top, with text links (medium-weight dark gray) and blue highlight for the active or hovered state, minimal or no borders.
ui_patterns.structural_pattern: Typical structure would be a <header> with a <nav><ul><li><a> pattern, styled with flexbox to distribute items horizontally. Active state indicated via color change to blue and possibly a thin bottom border.

ui_patterns.visual_description: The main explanatory content appears as a paragraph rather than a bullet list, with inline linking (e.g., the domain name and 'Learn more' link). If extended to lists, they would be low-density, left-aligned items with ample line spacing, minimal or no dividers, and links in blue #1A73E8 embedded in gray body text.
ui_patterns.structural_pattern: Expected HTML structure: semantic <ul>/<li> or <ol>/<li> lists or simple paragraph stacks. For media-style lists (e.g., services), likely flexbox 'media object' pattern: icon on the left, text on the right, similar to the icon+text layout inside the card.

heading.visual_style: Bold, modern neo-grotesque sans-serif with open counters and relatively high x-height, similar to Google Sans or Roboto. Clean, neutral, highly legible.

body.visual_style: Neutral, humanist/neo-grotesque sans-serif for paragraphs, with good readability at small sizes and modest stroke contrast (very similar to Roboto).

spacing_system.component_padding: Most components (card, buttons) appear to use 12–16px vertical and 16–24px horizontal padding, corresponding to 1.5–2× the 8px base unit.
spacing_system.section_margin: Vertical gaps between major sections (icon, heading, body, card, button row) are roughly 24–32px, with even larger top/bottom page margins (~64px+).

interaction_hints: Buttons likely have hover states where the primary button darkens slightly or gains a subtle shadow, and the secondary outlined button gets a light gray background.
Links (e.g., domain, 'Learn more') are blue by default and probably underline or darken on hover.
Buttons may use Material-style ripple or subtle opacity/scale transitions on click to indicate activation.
The card may gain a slightly darker border or subtle shadow on hover, indicating interactivity.
Focus states for keyboard navigation are likely indicated with a distinct focus ring (blue outline) around buttons and interactive text.
